title: Reduction primitives
items: stratify(source, rules) → Graph — route input to different reduction branches
funnel(sources, stages) → Graph — multi-source merge with sequential reduction stages
feedback(graph, condition, reentry) → Graph — introduce bounded cycles
budget_gate(source, constraints) → Node — pass-through with reactive constraint nodes
scorer(sources, weights) → Node — reactive multi-signal scoring

title: Domain templates (opinionated Graph factories)
items: Rearchitect feedback() as graph-visible bridge node (replaces subscribe-based shortcut)
Rearchitect funnel() bridges as graph-visible nodes (replaces subscribe forwarding)
stratify two-dep gating: gate classification on both source and rules settling

title: LLM graph composition
items: GraphSpec schema — JSON schema for declarative graph topology
compile_spec(spec, catalog) → Graph — instantiate from spec
decompile_graph(graph) → GraphSpec — extract spec from running graph
llm_compose(problem, adapter, opts) → GraphSpec — LLM generates topology from NL
llm_refine(spec, feedback, adapter) → GraphSpec — LLM modifies existing topology
spec_diff(spec_a, spec_b) — structural diff between specs
